user.title: Connect to TeslaPi
user.description: Enter the IP address or hostname of your TeslaPi device.

data_description.host: IP address or hostname of the TeslaPi Raspberry Pi
data_description.scan_interval: How often to poll for status updates (10-300 seconds)

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to TeslaPi. Verify the host and port are correct and the device is online.

abort.already_configured: This TeslaPi device is already configured.

data_description.scan_interval: How often to poll for status updates (10-300 seconds)

start_archive.name: Start archive
start_archive.description: Start a dashcam archive job on the TeslaPi device.

trigger.name: Trigger
trigger.description: Source of the trigger (ha or manual).

delete_after.name: Delete after archive
delete_after.description: Delete clips from the dashcam after successful archive.

cancel_archive.name: Cancel archive
cancel_archive.description: Cancel the currently running archive job.

start_music_sync.name: Start music sync
start_music_sync.description: Start a music sync job on the TeslaPi device.

mode.name: Mode
mode.description: Sync mode: selected, random, recent, or full.

paths.name: Paths
paths.description: Artist or album paths to sync (for selected mode).

count.name: Count
count.description: Number of items for random or recent mode.

type.name: Type
type.description: Item type for random mode: artist or album.

cancel_music_sync.name: Cancel music sync
cancel_music_sync.description: Cancel the currently running music sync job.
